untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of chart pattern morphology (tall vs short height, narrow vs wide width) which cannot be expressed using the allowed technical indicators. Pattern geometry requires custom pattern recognition logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: The core concept 'tall and narrow patterns in bull markets with upward breakout' describes a chart pattern shape that requires: (1) measurement of pattern height relative to its width, (2) identification of breakout direction, and (3) confirmation in bull regime. While the bull market regime can be captured, the geometric pattern properties (height-width ratio) are untranslatable to standard technical indicators. A custom pattern detection function would be needed to implement this rule properly.
